productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ess 3s Hsj Navy Blue Shorts
description: Composition Navy blue shorts made of 60% cotton, 40% polyster, adidas's signature three stripes along the sides in white, comfortable elastic waist band with inner drawstring, and brand name and logo embroidered on the left leg Fitting Regular Washcare Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 Degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on prints/trims/logo Comfort and style go hand in hand when it comes to this pair of navy blue shorts from adidas. The white stripes running down both sides add that touch of vibrancy to the shorts. The fabric is breathable, and the waist band is soft; for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Wear them for gymming, or jogging or to play a sport. A smart tee and a pair of well-fitting shoes are all you need to hit the road! Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
